verification.evidence: .github/workflows/lint.yml: guard-regression and write-guard-regression jobs exercise check-dangerous.sh and check-write.sh on every pull_request and push. The read-only phase write block is additionally exercised on every pull_request by the runtime-contracts job (concurrency-parity suite). The phase gate is further exercised by e2e-user-flows in .github/workflows/e2e.yml, which is workflow_dispatch-only (run before release), so it is not listed as a continuous ci_job.
